description: 3s spacing between beats with hook at 0s

input.prompt: [00:00] [HOOK] Shika explodes onto stage with strings blazing brilliantly! Camera dollies dramatically backward to capture everything. [00:03] Shilshul joins the action energetically from stage right. [00:06] Both puppets synchronize their movements perfectly. Keep same lighting. Audio: synth pulse, no dialogue. ENDING FRAME [EXACT]: Synchronized pose frozen.
